product_highlights: Procapil™ — clinically validated anti-hair loss active targeting DHT, micro-circulation, and follicle ageing
Capixyl™ — biomimetic peptide + red clover extract for hair growth
Apiscalp™ — plant-based scalp comfort and anti-dandruff active
Comprehensive clinical dossiers for regulatory support
notes: Sederma, a division of Croda International, is the originator of Procapil™ and Capixyl™ — two of the most clinically validated anti-hair loss actives in the cosmetic industry. Procapil™ targets the main causes of alopecia including poor scalp micro-circulation, follicle ageing, and DHT-mediated follicle atrophy, with clinical studies demonstrating a 58% reduction in hair loss. Capixyl™ combines a biomimetic peptide with red clover extract rich in biochanin A, providing a multi-target approach to hair growth support with strong clinical evidence.
